title: SlopSwapper
summary: A satirical AI-age landing page that turns content laundering into a polished product joke.
description: SlopSwapper is a sharp public-facing satire project: a fake AI content laundering platform presented with the confidence and polish of a real startup landing page.
It works because the implementation is serious even though the premise is absurd. That mix of taste, front-end execution, and commentary makes it a strong late-era city in Phil's public world.

media.alt: A preview image for the SlopSwapper GitHub repository.
media.caption: A knowingly polished fake product for the age of AI slop.

greatWorks.title: Authenticity Exchange
greatWorks.summary: A fake startup surface that turns AI-era anxieties about authorship into product satire.

relationships.label: AI product framing and public experimentation

highlights: Turns AI commentary into a polished, memorable product joke.
Shows front-end craft, satire, and product framing in one small repo.
Feels like a real launch even while critiquing the surrounding ecosystem.
productionQueue: Push the fake product world further with stronger lore and testimonials.
Expand the visual language so the satire lands even faster.
Use the project as a public proof-point for taste-driven front-end execution.
wonders: The Leading AI Content Laundering Platform

architectureNotes: The joke only works because the product surface is executed convincingly.
Pairs commentary with a real front-end and app structure rather than a throwaway mock.
